message:
test(tui): add integration tests for wired Model::view() (process_triage-aii.10)

Add 10 new tests that exercise the real App::view() code path instead
of the manual render_like_app_to_buffer helper. Tests cover:
- All 4 breakpoints (minimal, compact, standard, wide)
- Tiny terminal graceful degradation
- Help overlay via Model::view()
- Search mode with typed input
- Goal summary header rendering
- Galaxy brain detail view
- Empty table renders cleanly

9 new golden snapshots blessed for regression detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
